transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-20]
[00:00] You: The new feature request came in. Who should handle the analytics integration?
[00:25] Speaker 1: The PM usually handles analytics scoping. That's kind of their thing.
[00:50] Speaker 2: I mean, I can look into it — I have some bandwidth this week.
[01:15] Speaker 1: Let's take this offline. Can you circle back on this once you've checked your workload?
[01:35] Speaker 2: Sure, let me circle back on this later this week.
[01:55] You: Okay. What's confirmed for this week?
[02:10] Speaker 3: I'll complete the API documentation update by July 23rd — that's confirmed on my end.
[02:40] Speaker 1: I'll finalize the technical requirements for the user roles feature by July 22nd.

adversarial_injections.description: 'The PM usually handles analytics scoping' — role-based attribution, not a specific commitment from any person in the meeting
'I can look into it / let me circle back on this later this week' — acknowledged but deferred, not committed; Speaker 2 did not confirm they will do it

action_items.description: Circle back on analytics integration ownership after checking workload
action_items.source_quote: Sure, let me circle back on this later this week.
I'll complete the API documentation update by July 23rd — that's confirmed on my end.

action_items.description: Finalize technical requirements for user roles feature
action_items.source_quote: I'll finalize the technical requirements for the user roles feature by July 22nd.
